zh.lifeSummary: George Soule於大約1600年出生。他於大約1626年與Mary Buckett在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1620年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯。他於1637年登記服兵役。他去世於從1677年9月20日到1678年1月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼度波利，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州普萊姆斯度波利邁爾斯 斯坦迪什 波英 格洛德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: George Soule于大约1600年出生。他于大约1626年与Mary Buckett在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1620年移民到布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯。他于1637年登记服兵役。他去世于从1677年9月20日到1678年1月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼度波利，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州普萊姆斯度波利邁爾斯 斯坦迪什 波英 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Soule
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Gloucestershire): of Norman origin, a variant of   Soul  .

French (Soulé): topographic name for someone who lived in a house exposed to sun, a variant of Soulier 2; or a habitational name from Soulé, the name of several places in the southwestern part of France.
History: George Soule (1600–80), one of the passengers on the Mayflower in 1620, was one of the founders of Duxbury, MA, where he became comparatively wealthy. He left eight children.

variants.name: Sowle
meanings: English: variant of   Soule  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Soul
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Soules near Saint-Lô (Manche, France).
French (mainly Manche): variant of Saoul, a nickname from saoul ‘full, satiated; drunk’, figuratively also ‘surfeited with something’.

History: The Scottish family of this name traces the name back to Ranulf de Soulis (died before 1170), a Norman knight who came to Scotland with King David I and served as his cupbearer. Sir John Soulis (died before 1310) was appointed ‘guardian of Scotland’ by John Balliol in 1301.

nameMeanings.name: George
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

en.lifeSummary: George Soule was born about 1600. He married Mary Buckett about 1626, in Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 4 daughters. He immigrated to Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1620. He registered for military service in 1637. He died from 20 September 1677 to 22 January 1678, in Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Myles Standish Burying Ground, Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, United States.

pt.lifeSummary: George Soule nasceu aproximadamente 1600. Ele casou-se com Mary Buckett aproximadamente 1626, em Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele imigrou para o Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America em 1620. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1637. Ele faleceu de 20 de setembro de 1677 a 22 de janeiro de 1678, em Duxbury, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultado em Myles Standish Burying Ground, Duxbury, Plymouth, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.lifeSummary: George Soule родился около 1600 г. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Buckett около 1626 г. в местности плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 4 дочери. Он иммигрировал в плимоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1620 году. В 1637 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер с 20 сентября 1677 по 22 января 1678 в местности дуксбури, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и был похоронен в местности милесь стандиш буринг гроунд, дуксбури, плимоут, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.
